headers.comment: Security headers (M3) + never cache the HTML shell. The shell points at the current fingerprinted JS; without max-age=0 a browser/CDN kept serving an OLD index.html (whose old chunks still exist on Vercel, so nothing 404s and the auto-reload never fires). camera/microphone are allowed for self (the in-app recorder needs them). No strict resource-CSP here yet — that needs dedicated testing against Supabase/Gemini/media/OAuth origins; frame-ancestors 'none' (clickjacking) is safe to ship now.
Fingerprinted build assets are immutable — safe to cache forever. This rule is LAST so it wins over the catch-all for /assets/*.
